Prof. Elena Rostova

Chair of Quantum Cosmology

CERN

Biography Profile

Professor Rostova is a theoretical cosmologist working at CERN. Her focus is on gravitational waves and their potential for manipulation. She is currently leading a controversial project attempting to generate microscopic gravitational wave interference patterns.

Symposium Presentation

"Gravitational Wave Interference as a Propulsion Mechanism"

Discussing the theoretical framework for using constructive and destructive interference of high-frequency gravitational waves to create directed spacetime curvature for propulsion.

Powered by our Sponsors
